entries.title: Exposition on Psalm 33
entries.excerpt: Rejoice in the Lord, O you righteous: rejoice, O you righteous, not in yourselves, for that is not safe; but in the Lord. For praise is comely to the upright Psalm 32:1: these praise the Lord, who submit themselves unto the Lord; for else they are distorted and perverse. Praise the Lord with harp: praise the Lord, presenting unto Him your bodies a living sacrifice. Romans 12:1 Sing unto Him with the psaltery for ten strings Psalm 32:2: let your members be servants to the love of God, and of your neighbour, in which are kept both the three and the seven commandments. Sing unto Him a new song:…
